retries.statusDetails:
Error: expect(received).not.toMatch(expected)

Expected pattern: not /Minified React error #(418|423)/i
Received string:      "Console error: 
[error]: Loading the script 'blob:https://mobalytics.gg/812b69d9-b34c-4e45-8763-65008a2e3fae' violates the following Content Security Policy directive: \"script-src * 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'\". Note that 'script-src-elem' was not explicitly set, so 'script-src' is used as a fallback. Note that '*' matches only URLs with network schemes ('http', 'https', 'ws', 'wss'), or URLs whose scheme matches `self`'s scheme. The scheme 'blob:' must be added explicitly. The action has been blocked.,Console error:
